content:
💡 youthub | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Watching YouTube videos directly from the terminal without using a web browser.
✨ Key Features: • TUI grid with previews • Custom ffplay-yt player • SponsorBlock integration • 1080p video playback • Direct SABR streaming
📖 Summary: YouHub is a terminal-based YouTube client that allows users to browse, search, and watch YouTube videos directly from their console. It features a TUI grid interface, a custom ffplay-yt player, and integrates features like SponsorBlock for an ad-free experience without needing a web browser.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
